title: Gerund: en faisant, en parlant
subtitle: Say by doing or while doing.
duolingoBridge: A2 learners can begin using en + -ant for simple method and simultaneity.
overview: Knowledge point 1: en + -ant can mean while doing.
Knowledge point 2: it can also mean by doing.

items.en: I learn by listening a lot.

items.fr: Je marche en parlant au téléphone.
items.en: I walk while speaking on the phone.

items.fr: On peut y aller en prenant le bus.
items.en: We can go there by taking the bus.
items.es: Podemos ir allí tomando el autobús.

items.fr: Elle sourit en lisant le message.
items.en: She smiles while reading the message.

items.fr: Je progresse en pratiquant tous les jours.
items.en: I improve by practicing every day.
